title: Placement Examination
content:
Placement Examination

Dear Students,

For the 2025–2026 Academic Year, the Foreign Languages Coordinatorship will administer the Placement Examination on Tuesday, 16 September 2025. Attendance is mandatory for all students who have enrolled in English-medium programs at our University. The exam will start at 09:00 for Turkish students and at 11:00 for international students. Please follow the announcements on the Preparatory School website regarding the designated examination venues.

Turkish students taking the examination are required to be present in their assigned classrooms by

08:30

, and international students by

10:30

. Students must bring their student identification card; if the card has not yet been issued, a registration certificate obtained from the Student Affairs Office must be presented instead. In addition, students are required to bring an official identity document or passport, as well as a pencil, eraser, and sharpener.

The exam results will be announced on

Wednesday, September 17

on the Preparatory School website. Based on the results, details regarding the

Exemption Exam

to be held on

Thursday, September 18

will be shared in the following days.

We wish all our students a successful academic year.

Placement Exam

(Attendance is Mandatory)

16 September 2025, 09:00 (Turkish Students), Central Campus

16 September 2025, 11:00 (International Students), Central Campus

For details:

https://hazirlik.uskudar.edu.tr/seviye-tespit-sinavi-placement-exam-16092025
